home-loads.name: Home page loads
home-loads.description: Albunmanía landing page renders with main heading visible

auth-sign-in-form.name: Sign-in form display and interaction
auth-sign-in-form.description: User can navigate to sign-in, see the form, and interact with inputs

auth-sign-up-form.name: Sign-up form display and validation
auth-sign-up-form.description: User can see sign-up form fields and triggers password mismatch validation

auth-forgot-password-form.name: Forgot password form
auth-forgot-password-form.description: User can reach the forgot-password page and see the form

auth-login-invalid.name: Sign-in with invalid credentials
auth-login-invalid.description: Invalid credentials show error gracefully without a hard crash

auth-protected-redirect.name: Protected route redirect
auth-protected-redirect.description: Unauthenticated user navigating to /dashboard or /backoffice is redirected to /sign-in
